memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159
memoryArtifacts.description: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain於大約1087年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England29歲，母親Emma de Blois13歲。他於1108年之前與Sybil Corbet在威爾士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1155年之前在英國哈普爾維古姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain于大约1087年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England29岁，母亲Emma de Blois13岁。他于1108年之前与Sybil Corbet在威尔士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1155年之前在英国哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain was born about 1087, in Wales, his father, Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England, was 29 and his mother, Emma de Blois, was 13. He married Sybil Corbet before 1108, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1155, in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain est né environ 1087, à Galles, son père, Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Emma de Blois, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Corbet avant 1108, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1155, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain um 1087 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England 29 und seine Mutter Emma de Blois 13. Er hat vor 1108 in Wales Sybil Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1155 in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain è nato il circa 1087 nel Galles, il suo padre, Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Blois, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Corbet prima del 1108, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1155, nel Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlainが約1087年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of Englandは29歳，母Emma de Bloisは13歳であった。1108年以前にウェールズでSybil Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1155年以前にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain(이)가 대략 1087년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Blois(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1108년 이전 웨일스에서 Sybil Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1155년 이전 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Gales, seu pai, Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Blois, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Corbet antes 1108, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1155, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain родился около 1087 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Blois, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Corbet перед 1108 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1155 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herbert FitzHerbert Lord of Blaen Llyfni, King's Chamberlain nació aproximadamente 1087, en Gales, su papá, Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Emma de Blois, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Sybil Corbet antes de 1108, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1155, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
